_schema: One narrator voice per story (default nova). Characters don't get their own voice or speed — they get 'instructions' that tell gpt-4o-mini-tts how the narrator should INFLECT (pitch / tone / emotion only) when voicing that character. Pacing stays consistent throughout — a parent reading aloud doesn't speed up and slow down per character.
_pacingRule: Every narrator direction must end with 'Maintain a natural, steady storytelling pace throughout — do not speed up or slow down.' Character flex instructions must describe pitch/tone/emotion ONLY. Never write 'slow', 'fast', 'quick', 'measured', 'drawn-out' (length), etc. in either.

classic_three_little_pigs.narrator: Warm bedtime storyteller voice — a parent reading aloud, clear and expressive with natural warmth. Maintain a natural, steady storytelling pace throughout — do not speed up or slow down.

characters.pip: Same storyteller voice, lifted brighter and slightly cheerful-lazy — playing a carefree young piglet.
characters.pat: Same storyteller voice, softer and a touch yawny — playing a sleepy young piglet.
characters.penny: Same storyteller voice, bright and determined — playing a sensible little piglet.
characters.pigs: Same storyteller voice, lifted bright and playful — playing the piglets together.
characters.wolf: Same storyteller voice, dropped low with a growly, smirking villain inflection — playing a cartoonish big-bad wolf for young kids. Playful, not frightening.

characters.townspeople: Same storyteller voice, roughened into a grumbling shared chorus — playing the worried and angry townsfolk of Hamelin.

classic_emperors_new_clothes.narrator: Warm bedtime storyteller voice, a parent reading aloud, clear and expressive with a gentle twinkle of humor. Maintain a natural, steady storytelling pace throughout, do not speed up or slow down.

characters.emperor: Same storyteller voice, lifted slightly higher and puffed up with vain pride, turning softer and embarrassed near the end.
characters.tailors: Same storyteller voice, hushed and slippery with a sly sing-song charm, playing two sneaky trickster tailors.
characters.minister: Same storyteller voice, dropped a little lower and wobbly with age, playing a worried old royal advisor.
characters.child: Same storyteller voice, lifted bright and clear with cheerful honesty, playing a truthful little kid.
characters.crowd: Same storyteller voice, warm and rolling like many voices blending together, playing townspeople cheering and then laughing.
